items.summary: Update the ServicesPage to display exactly 6 service categories, each with its listed sub-items and a sample image: (1) Design Services — Logo Design, Brand Identity, Marketing Materials, Social Media Graphics, Packaging Design, Photo Editing; (2) Digital Printing — Business Cards, Flyers & Brochures, Posters, Letterheads, Envelopes, Books; (3) Outdoor Printing — Flex Banners, Star Flex, Signboards, Canvas; (4) Indoor Printing — Stickers (Die-cut), Stickers (White/Black/Grey back), Transparent Stickers, Vinyl Printing, Indoor Banners, Canvas Prints, Posters; (5) Screen Printing & Personalization — Pen Printing, T-Shirt Printing, Balloon Printing, Sublimation Printing, DTF (Direct to Film) Printing; (6) Offset Printing — with description 'Cost-effective bulk printing with consistent quality for large volume orders' and sub-items: Magazines, Catalogs, Books, Packaging / Cardboard Boxes, Paper Bags. Each category card must display its sample image (from frontend/public/assets/generated/), the category title, the sub-item list, and a 'Get a Quote' CTA button.
Render the 6 generated service category sample images as static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated/ and reference them in the ServicesPage component.
